title: Ecclesia | MBA IB DSE
headings: Mr MALLADI DINKAR VP-Corporate Affairs, Kerry Indev Logistics
Mr MANOJ NAIR Marketing Head, Billion-dollar IT firm
Mr NAVEEN GUPTA Head, Production planning & Logistics, EXIM, Ex. Jaquar
Mr RAJAN BHANDERI CEO, Hitachi Systems MC
Mr R. BALAJI Senior VP, Mahindra Finance
paragraphs: “A nation’s strength ultimately consists in what it can do on its own, and not in what it can borrow from others” - Indira Gandhi

Team IISAC is delighted to share that MBA IB, Department of Commerce, Delhi School of Economics successfully hosted its esteemed corporate panel discussion event, " The Corporate Ecclesia'22 ", organised by IISAC @teamiisac_dse.
The theme for this year's event was "Leadership: Coping with the new normal".

Ms Niti Bhasin, a Student Coordinator of Delhi School of Economics, started off by introducing the panelists and also gave a brief introduction on the topic of discussion. She talked about Leadership and challenges in front of the Indian Export System.
After introductions, the panelists were asked to put forward their views regarding Leadership.

The honourable panellists shared their timely advice on the role of a leader, especially during times of crisis such as the pandemic. The panel discussion was highly insightful, revolving mainly around three broad themes. A) Traits of a good leader B) How leadership is derived from behavioural and mindset qualities rather than designations? C) The importance of being flexible as a leader

Then, Panelists happily answered the questions and doubts posed by the students towards the end of the session. We thank the honourable Panelists for making our event a success. The conference was fruitful for students, and would definitely help them become better leaders in the future. We will again come with such events in future.
